pages.name: Restaurant Dashboard — Dishes
pages.note: Requires restaurant ownership. Shows per-dish sentiment analysis.

onMount.description: Fetch restaurant analytics (same endpoint, includes per-dish data)
onMount.dataSource: API route → Firestore — restaurants, dishes, reviews collections

userActions.trigger: Sort dropdown (by rating / by review count)

onMount.description: Fetch admin stats (counts of restaurants, dishes, reviews, users, pending requests, flagged reviews)

userActions.outcome: Claim approved (sets restaurant ownerId) → claim removed from list
Claim rejected → claim removed from list
New dish created in Firestore → request removed from list → notification sent to requester
Request rejected → removed from list → notification sent to requester
Coupon created → added to list → form closed
Confirmation dialog → review deleted (with dish stats recalculation, user stats adjustment) → removed from list

apiRoutes.description: Create a new review for a dish
apiRoutes.validation: Zod schema (createReviewSchema) — requires dishId, restaurantId, tasteRating, portionRating, valueRating, tags[], text, optional photoUrl
apiRoutes.returns: { item: Review, pointsAwarded: number, newBalance: number, isFullReview: boolean }
sideEffects: Auto-sets dish cover image if none exists and review has photo
Syncs dish to Typesense if configured

apiRoutes.description: Update an existing review (within 24-hour edit window)
apiRoutes.validation: Zod schema (updateReviewSchema) — tasteRating, portionRating, valueRating, tags[], text

apiRoutes.description: Delete a review (by author or admin)
Flag a review for admin review
Vote a review as helpful
Create a Razorpay order for premium subscription
Verify Razorpay payment and activate premium
apiRoutes.validation: Zod schema (verifyPaymentSchema) — requires razorpay_payment_id, razorpay_order_id, razorpay_signature

apiRoutes.description: Handle Razorpay webhooks (subscription cancelled/expired)
List restaurants, optionally filtered by city/area
Get restaurant details by ID
Get restaurant analytics (owner-only dashboard data)
apiRoutes.validation: assertRestaurantOwner — verifies caller owns the restaurant
apiRoutes.auth: Required (must be restaurant owner or admin)

apiRoutes.description: List all dishes for a restaurant
Submit a restaurant ownership claim
apiRoutes.validation: Zod schema (submitClaimSchema) — requires phone, role ('owner' | 'manager'), optional proofDocumentUrl

apiRoutes.description: Search and list dishes with filters
apiRoutes.validation: Zod schema (dishSearchParamsSchema) — q, city, area, cuisine, dietary, priceRange, sortBy, cursor
apiRoutes.returns: { items: Dish[], hasMore: boolean, nextCursorId?: string }
apiRoutes.note: Uses Typesense for search if configured, falls back to Firestore

apiRoutes.description: List reviews for a specific dish (paginated)
apiRoutes.returns: { items: Review[], hasMore: boolean, nextCursorId?: string }

apiRoutes.description: Mark a single notification as read
Get count of unread notifications
Mark all notifications as read for current user
List all pending restaurant claims
Approve or reject a restaurant claim
apiRoutes.validation: Zod schema (reviewClaimSchema) — requires claimId, action ('approve' | 'reject'), optional note
sideEffects: On approve: sets restaurant.ownerId and isVerified in transaction

apiRoutes.description: Unflag/approve a flagged review
Admin delete a review with full cascading updates
Approve or reject a dish request
apiRoutes.validation: Zod schema (dishRequestActionSchema) — action ('approve' | 'reject'), optional note, optional category, optional dietary
sideEffects: On approve: creates new dish document

apiRoutes.description: List all active coupons
Create a new coupon
apiRoutes.validation: Zod schema (createCouponSchema) — title, restaurantId, restaurantName, discountValue, discountType, pointsCost, totalStock, expiresAt, codes[]

apiRoutes.description: Deactivate a coupon
Toggle premium status for a user
Toggle admin role for a user
Invalidate analytics cache for a restaurant
apiRoutes.note: Clears server-side analytics cache (used for restaurant dashboard)

apiRoutes.description: Sync all dishes from Firestore to Typesense search index
apiRoutes.returns: { synced: number, failed: number, total: number }

apiRoutes.description: Get user's DishPoints balance
Get available coupons catalogue for redemption
Get user's claimed/redeemed coupons
Get user's points transaction history
apiRoutes.returns: { items: PointsTransaction[], hasMore: boolean, nextCursor?: string }

apiRoutes.description: Redeem DishPoints for a coupon
Get user's wishlist items
Add a dish to user's wishlist
Remove a dish from user's wishlist
Get supported cities and their areas
apiRoutes.returns: { items: Array<{ city: string, areas: string[] }> }
apiRoutes.note: Reads from constants (SUPPORTED_CITIES, CITY_AREAS) — no Firestore call

layouts.name: Protected Layout
layouts.provides: AuthGate (redirects to /login if not authenticated) + PageShell
layouts.authBehavior: Client-side auth check via useAuth(). Redirects to /login?redirect={currentUrl} if not authenticated. Also sets noindex meta tag.

layouts.name: Admin Layout
layouts.provides: Admin auth gate (redirects to / if not admin) + AdminShell sidebar
layouts.authBehavior: Client-side check via useAuth(). Requires user.isAdmin === true.

layouts.name: Auth Layout
layouts.provides: Pass-through (no wrapper — auth pages use AuthShell component directly)

layouts.name: Root Layout
layouts.provides: HTML skeleton, fonts, providers (QueryClientProvider, AuthProvider, Sonner toaster, CityProvider, ThemeProvider)

middleware.description: UX guard (not a security boundary). Checks for presence of auth token cookie or header on protected paths. Redirects to /login if missing.
middleware.note: Edge middleware cannot verify Firebase ID tokens. Actual security is enforced in API routes (getRequestAuth) and client-side (useAuth).
